# Why flows?

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="49%"}
![](images/slide_why_flows/COVID-19-Canada-deaths.png){width="100%"}

::: {style="font-size:0.62rem; color:#aaa; opacity:0.10;"}

[Health Infobase Canada](https://health-infobase.canada.ca/covid-19)
:::
:::
::: {.column width="49%"}
![](images/slide_why_flows/COVID-19%20Age%20Groups%20Resurgence.jpeg){width="100%"}

::: {style="font-size:0.62rem; color:#aaa;"}
[Monod et al Science 2021](https://www.science.org/doi/10.1126/science.abe8372)
:::
:::
:::
